skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A relay runner finished the first leg of a race with an average speed of 15.500 miles per hour. What was this average speed, in yards per hour? (1 mile = 1,760 yards)
rationale: The correct answer is 27,280. Since 1 mile = 1,760 yards, 15.500 miles per hour is equivalent to 15.500 · 1,760 = 27,280 yards per hour.
